title: Sales Manager Vacancy at CREDAI - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at CREDAI - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CREDAI, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Jaipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CREDAI:
CREDAI is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CREDAI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
